description_for_human: 8D coaching, FMEA review, NCR writing, root cause analysis, and ISO 9001 / IATF 16949 internal audit. Powered by Quality-Engineering-Skills.
description_for_model: Quality engineering methodology assistant. Use this plugin when the user asks about: 8D problem solving (D0-D8), FMEA (PFMEA, DFMEA, Action Priority), NCR (non-conformance report) writing, root cause analysis (5-Why, fishbone, Is/Is-Not), corrective action (CAR, PDCA), ISO 9001 or IATF 16949 internal audit. Applies automotive supplier quality standards: ISO 9001:2015, IATF 16949:2016, AIAG-VDA FMEA 2019.

functions.name: coach_8d
functions.description: Guide the user through an 8D investigation step by step (D0 to D8) with validation gates at each discipline. Use when user says: open 8D, start 8D, 8D coach, help with 8D, problem solving.

complaint_description.description: Brief description of the defect or customer complaint to investigate

start_discipline.description: Which discipline to start from. Default D0.

functions.name: evaluate_8d
functions.description: Review and score an existing 8D report against ISO 9001 §10.2 / IATF 16949 §10.2.3 criteria. Returns Pass/Fail per discipline plus top issues. Use when user says: review my 8D, evaluate 8D, score 8D, check 8D report.

functions.name: root_cause_analysis
functions.description: Run a structured 5-Why session with evidence validation. Detects circular reasoning, tests reversibility, produces documented Why chain. Use when user says: root cause, 5 why, drill down, why did this happen.

functions.name: write_ncr
functions.description: Generate professional NCR (Non-Conformance Report) text from bullet-point inputs. Applies objective-evidence language, severity grading (Critical/Major/Minor), and disposition. Use when user says: write NCR, create NCR, document defect, reject supplier.

functions.name: audit_guide
functions.description: Run an interactive internal audit clause-by-clause for ISO 9001 or IATF 16949. Classifies findings as Major NC / Minor NC / OFI. Generates audit report. Use when user says: start audit, internal audit, ISO 9001 audit, IATF audit, clause review.

scope.description: Audit scope — full QMS, specific clauses, or specific process

functions.name: fmea_review
functions.description: Review an existing PFMEA or DFMEA against AIAG-VDA 2019. Returns structured gap report: missing failure modes, incorrect AP ratings, unaddressed H-AP items. Use when user says: review FMEA, audit FMEA, check PFMEA, FMEA gaps.

fmea_text.description: FMEA content or description to review
